component.name: StreamKeep
component.summary: Download VODs, live streams, podcasts, and direct media URLs

description.p: StreamKeep is a multi-platform desktop tool for downloading and archiving live streams, VODs, podcasts, and direct media URLs. Features native extractors for Kick, Twitch, Rumble, SoundCloud, Reddit, Audius, and Podcast RSS feeds, with yt-dlp as a universal fallback.

Includes channel monitoring with auto-recording, download queue with bandwidth scheduling, embedded media player, post-processing (convert, trim, silence removal, transcription), upload destinations (S3, FTP, WebDAV), and a plugin SDK for community extensions.
Adds Podcast Namespace transcript/chapter sidecar downloads, Settings controls for bilingual-subtitle merge and LRC export, and an opt-in YouTube live-chat replay download trigger.

Adds aria2c external-downloader routing with URL sanitization, HAR-capture media/manifest import, an optional queue-complete power action, and a streamkeep:// protocol handler with browser bookmarklet.
Makes HLS parsing and resume standards-complete, corrects WebVTT/podcast transcript parsing, and adds bilingual subtitle merge, LRC export, and YouTube live-chat replay normalization.
Adds a non-DRM HLS clear-key override and hardens backup restore, event hooks, remote image handling, plugin isolation, and credential storage.
Adds full yt-dlp output, subtitle, SponsorBlock, and incremental playlist sync controls.
Adds a restart-persistent failed-job recovery ledger with desktop and web-remote retry/discard actions.
Adds archive integrity manifests and History verify/rescan recovery actions.
Security hardening, extractor fixes, and engineering audit.
